svg.text: COOKIE CONSENT & GDPR COMPLIANCE - Privacy Settings & Data Rights

g.text: Manage your cookie preferences and exercise your data rights.
Required for basic site functionality. These cannot be disabled.
Session management, security tokens, preferences storage
Language preferences, theme settings, saved form data
Help us understand how visitors use the site.
Page views, navigation paths, feature usage statistics
Used for personalized advertising and tracking.
Ad targeting, cross-site tracking, social media integration
Your consent was last updated on January 10, 2026
Version: 1.0 | All preferences saved to local storage
Download all data we have stored about you. Includes:
• Locally persisted settings and form data
Remove all locally stored data. This action:
• Clears all preferences and consent history
• Treats you as a first-time visitor on next visit
When our privacy policy changes, you will be prompted to review and update your preferences.
🔗 This page is always accessible via the footer "Privacy Settings" link
Accessible within 2 clicks from any page
Provide accessible privacy settings page for preference management
Provide data export functionality (GDPR Right of Access)
Provide data deletion request functionality (Right to Erasure)
User preferences persist with zero data loss across browser sessions
Privacy settings accessible within 2 clicks from any page
Data export completes within 5 seconds for typical data volumes
